regression_check: test_close_auto_populates_pr_url_from_latest_executor_run — fails on main with TypeError (mark_resolved_on_workspace_close has no workspace_id kwarg), passes on this branch with reconciled pr_url written to Finding.
reviewer_notes: Two-layer fix: (1) executor success path persists verified pr_url onto Finding (forward defence) — _advance_finding_status now writes pr_url alongside the status='remediated' advance whenever the executor produced status='pr_created' and the PR URL has already been verified live on GitHub by the existing verification step in AgentExecutor.run(); (2) close handler reconciles from AgentRun history when the Finding row still lacks pr_url (backstop for runs whose structured_output never reached the Finding column — including the fsevents-style timeout case where the executor created the PR but timed out before parsing). The residual case where the executor fully failed AND no AgentRun carries pr_url (orphan PR on GitHub) emits a WARNING log; recovering that would require GitHub introspection on the workspace's branch and is explicitly out of scope per the EF-B14 prompt. Existing posture-finding close path (no executor runs) still flips status with pr_url=null unchanged. Full backend non-e2e suite (1264 tests) green; ruff clean.
